summary: Replace em-dashes in the product description copy with commas.
reason: House/style convention for this owner's published copy avoids em-dashes in human-facing product description; the generated description blurb carried one across the root help, agent-context, and MCP tool surfaces.
validated_outcome: `ht-ml-pp-cli --help` and agent-context description render without em-dashes; go build passes.
